스팀페이지
← 스토리 목록으로

67D22F4246E2D6E1B17CB1AC92219A36, Fire Safety, Always and Forever

Main Story

67D22F4246E2D6E1B17CB1AC92219A36”, “Fire Safety, Always and Forever

퀘스트 배경

0F1F233F4E3DC5FF65AFC2BE19E763FC”, “Aiden says if you want to learn how to safely make a campfire, come talk to him.

진행 상황

9B82A3A94323B8F943CE06BCE14EC970”, “Aiden asks you to gather 5 pieces of wood so he can teach you how to build a fire safely.

완료

DAFAC9A1411E29F8EB2FB288AF2172E3”, “You learned how to make a campfire from Aiden.
